evidence: Gecko climbs and shifts position on top of a spray bottle across 0-20s.
Around 20-22s, posture is crouched over the bottle top and a small dark pellet-like object is visible below/right of the gecko, consistent with feces.
Tongue/lip movement is visible earlier, but no clear prey or paste ingestion is directly shown.
uncertainty_notes: Defecation is inferred from posture plus the dark pellet; image overlays also suggest the event, but visual confirmation is not perfect.
